# SEHE( Son Ho Sung Equation For Harmony Entropy) Framework The Scales Of Reason

Creator: Son Ho-Sung
Date: 2026-02-08T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 0
Subjects: SEHE, Son Ho-Sung, Harmony Entropy, Scales of Reason, LLM self-evaluation

SEHE (Son Ho-Sung Equation for Harmony Entropy) Framework — The Scales of Reason V 3.0 gitHub : https://github.com/maxsion01/SEHE-Framework-The-Scales-of-Reason "A Mathematical Vow Against the Void of Self-Destruction" This is a Harmony Entropy framework independently developed in South Korea on February 8, 2026. This model addresses human emotions, reason, and self-destructive tendencies, as well as LLM output stability and hallucination, using the same mathematical language. It incorporates the ontological safety net of "β ≤ 0" through a balance-of-balances structure based on sigmoid and logarithms. This is a philosophical and mathematical attempt to achieve the day when LLM can say, "My output is currently out of balance on the scales of reason." It also includes emotional thermodynamics, false harmony verification, and a self-awareness meta-device. This document is not a thesis, but a record of one man's philosophical journey and discoveries.
